description: Creates an Entra ID app registration with custom OAuth2 scopes, a service principal, and token lifetime policies. Equivalent to Okta's custom authorization server. Manages the API surface for internal applications.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Access token: 60 min. ID token: 60 min. Refresh token: 30 days.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Access token: 30 min. ID token: 30 min. Refresh token: 14 days.
risk_profile_effects.strict: Access token: 15 min. ID token: 15 min. Refresh token: 7 days.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls token lifetimes — shorter tokens mean more frequent re-authentication but less exposure if a token is stolen.

app_registration_name.label: App Registration Name
app_registration_name.client_description: Display name for the API app registration in Entra ID. This is the central API that your internal applications will use for authentication and authorization.

api_scopes.label: API Scopes
api_scopes.client_description: Custom OAuth2 scopes exposed by the API. Applications request these scopes to get appropriate access levels. Default: read, write, admin.

access_token_lifetime_minutes.label: Access Token Lifetime (minutes)
access_token_lifetime_minutes.client_description: How long access tokens remain valid. Shorter = more secure but more frequent token refreshes. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

id_token_lifetime_minutes.label: ID Token Lifetime (minutes)
id_token_lifetime_minutes.client_description: How long ID tokens remain valid. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

refresh_token_lifetime_days.label: Refresh Token Lifetime (days)
refresh_token_lifetime_days.client_description: How long refresh tokens remain valid. After this period, users must fully re-authenticate. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

outputs.app_registration_id: Object ID for the app registration
outputs.app_registration_client_id: Application (client) ID for the app registration — use this in application configs
outputs.service_principal_id: Object ID for the service principal (enterprise app)
outputs.scope_ids: Map of scope name to scope UUID
